title: IndabaX Kenya 2026
description:
IndabaX Kenya 2026 is East Africa's premier machine learning and artificial intelligence conference, bringing together researchers, practitioners, students, and industry leaders from across the continent and beyond.

Over three transformative days, participants will engage in cutting-edge research presentations, hands-on workshops, keynote talks from world-renowned AI experts, and networking opportunities with Africa's brightest minds in AI.

What to Expect:

  • 20+ Keynote Talks from leading AI researchers
  • 30+ Technical Paper Presentations
  • 10+ Hands-on Workshops
  • Networking Sessions & Career Fair
  • AI Expo showcasing African AI startups
  • Student Poster Session

Topics: Natural Language Processing for African Languages, Computer Vision for Agriculture, Healthcare AI, Climate Tech, Ethical AI, AI for Social Good, Reinforcement Learning, and more.
excerpt: Join Africa's premier AI & ML conference. 3 days of keynotes, workshops, and networking with 500+ attendees from 20+ countries.

title: NOAI Pre-Conference Workshop
description:
The NOAI (Network of AI) Pre-Conference Workshop is a full-day intensive training session designed for AI enthusiasts looking to deepen their practical skills before the main IndabaX Kenya conference.

This hands-on workshop will cover fundamental and advanced machine learning topics with real-world applications tailored to African contexts.

Workshop Topics:

  • Introduction to Deep Learning with PyTorch
  • Building NLP Models for African Languages
  • Computer Vision for AgriTech Applications
  • Deploying ML Models in Low-Resource Settings
  • Ethics and Bias in AI Systems

Who Should Attend: Students, researchers, developers, and anyone interested in practical machine learning. Basic Python knowledge required.

What You'll Get:

  • Hands-on coding exercises
  • Real-world datasets
  • Certificate of completion
  • Workshop materials and code
  • Access to mentors and instructors
excerpt: Full-day hands-on ML workshop covering deep learning, NLP, computer vision, and deployment. Perfect for students and early-career professionals.

title: AI for Healthcare Symposium
description:
A specialized symposium focusing on the intersection of artificial intelligence and healthcare in Africa. This event brings together medical practitioners, AI researchers, policymakers, and health-tech entrepreneurs to discuss challenges and opportunities in applying AI to improve healthcare outcomes across the continent.

Key Topics:

  • AI-powered diagnostic tools for low-resource settings
  • Medical imaging and radiology AI
  • Drug discovery and genomics
  • Telemedicine and remote patient monitoring
  • Privacy and data security in health AI
  • Regulatory frameworks for medical AI

Format: Panel discussions, case study presentations, and networking sessions.
excerpt: Specialized symposium on AI applications in African healthcare. Featuring medical AI experts, practitioners, and health-tech innovators.

title: Women in AI Kenya Meetup
description:
An inspiring gathering for women in AI to connect, share experiences, and support each other in their AI journeys. This inclusive event welcomes women at all career stages - from students to senior researchers and industry leaders.

Agenda:

  • Lightning talks from women AI leaders
  • Mentorship speed-dating sessions
  • Panel discussion on breaking barriers
  • Networking and community building
  • Career advice and resources

Open to all women interested in AI, regardless of technical background. Allies welcome.
excerpt: Empowering women in AI through networking, mentorship, and inspiring talks. Connect with female AI leaders and peers.

title: AI Startup Pitch Competition
description:
African AI startups compete for prizes, investment opportunities, and mentorship. The top 10 AI startups will pitch their solutions to a panel of investors, industry experts, and potential customers.

Prize Pool:

  • 1st Place: $10,000 + 3 months accelerator program
  • 2nd Place: $5,000 + Mentorship package
  • 3rd Place: $3,000 + Cloud credits
  • Audience Choice Award: $2,000

Judging Criteria: Innovation, market potential, technical feasibility, social impact, and team strength.

Featured Startup Sectors: AgriTech, FinTech, HealthTech, EdTech, Climate Tech, and more.
excerpt: Watch 10 African AI startups pitch for prizes and investment. $20,000 prize pool + accelerator opportunities.

title: IndabaX Kenya 2024
description:
IndabaX Kenya 2024 was a resounding success, bringing together 400+ AI enthusiasts from across East Africa. The three-day conference featured groundbreaking research presentations, workshops, and networking opportunities.

Highlights:

  • 35 technical paper presentations
  • 8 keynote talks from international and local experts
  • 6 hands-on workshops
  • 200+ students attended
  • 15 partner organizations

Thank you to all speakers, sponsors, volunteers, and attendees who made IndabaX Kenya 2024 unforgettable!
excerpt: IndabaX Kenya 2024 brought together 400+ attendees for 3 days of AI research, workshops, and networking. Thank you for making it a success!

title: IndabaX Kenya 2023
description:
IndabaX Kenya 2023 marked a significant milestone in Kenya's AI community growth. The conference attracted 350+ participants and featured cutting-edge AI research from African scholars.

Notable Moments:

  • First-ever AI for Agriculture track
  • Launch of Kenya AI Policy recommendations
  • Student hackathon with 50+ participants
  • 10+ industry partnerships announced
excerpt: IndabaX Kenya 2023 featured 350+ participants, groundbreaking AI research, and the launch of Kenya AI Policy recommendations.
